name: chr19_19p13_2_NOTCH3_SD
description: 19p13.12 SD field surrounding NOTCH3 (the CADASIL gene) plus EPS15L1 and ILVBL. Short flanking SDs of ~10-20 kb mediate occasional NAHR-driven CNVs and the locus sits on the chr19 SD background.

architecture.internal_structure: Short 5-20 kb intra-chromosomal SDs at 93-98% identity flanking NOTCH3, EPS15L1; recombination hotspot within NOTCH3 itself.
